'''mochangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jucund|jucund]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ch-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jucund|jucund]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mochangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mochangithi|mochangithi]] || [[word:mochangiji|mochangiji]] || [[word:mochangishi|mochangishi]] || [[word:mochangiki|mochangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mochanguthuthu|mochanguthuthu]] || [[word:mochangujuju|mochangujuju]] || [[word:mochangushushu|mochangushushu]] || [[word:mochangukuku|mochangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mochanguthu|mochanguthu]] || [[word:mochanguju|mochanguju]] || [[word:mochangushu|mochangushu]] || [[word:mochanguku|mochanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mochangufthuf|mochangufthuf]] || [[word:mochangufjuf|mochangufjuf]] || [[word:mochangufshuf|mochangufshuf]] || [[word:mochangufkuf|mochangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mochangethe|mochangethe]] || [[word:mochangeje|mochangeje]] || [[word:mochangeshe|mochangeshe]] || [[word:mochangeke|mochangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mochangothotho|mochangothotho]] || [[word:mochangojojo|mochangojojo]] || [[word:mochangoshosho|mochangoshosho]] || [[word:mochangokoko|mochangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mochangotho|mochangotho]] || [[word:mochangojo|mochangojo]] || [[word:mochangosho|mochangosho]] || [[word:mochangoko|mochangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mochangofthof|mochangofthof]] || [[word:mochangofjof|mochangofjof]] || [[word:mochangofshof|mochangofshof]] || [[word:mochangofkof|mochangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mochangĂŻfthĂŻf|mochangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mochangĂŻfjĂŻf|mochangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mochangĂŻfshĂŻf|mochangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mochangĂŻfkĂŻf|mochangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mochangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|mochangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mochangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|mochangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mochangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|mochangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mochangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|mochangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mochangĂŻfthĂŻf|mochangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mochangĂŻfjĂŻf|mochangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mochangĂŻfshĂŻf|mochangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mochangĂŻfkĂŻf|mochangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mochangĂŻfthĂŻf|mochangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mochangĂŻfjĂŻf|mochangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mochangĂŻfshĂŻf|mochangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mochangĂŻfkĂŻf|mochangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mochangĂŠthĂŠ|mochangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:mochangĂŠjĂŠ|mochangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:mochangĂŠshĂŠ|mochangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:mochangĂŠkĂŠ|mochangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mochangathatha|mochangathatha]] || [[word:mochangajaja|mochangajaja]] || [[word:mochangashasha|mochangashasha]] || [[word:mochangakaka|mochangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mochangatha|mochangatha]] || [[word:mochangaja|mochangaja]] || [[word:mochangasha|mochangasha]] || [[word:mochangaka|mochangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mochangafthaf|mochangafthaf]] || [[word:mochangafjaf|mochangafjaf]] || [[word:mochangafshaf|mochangafshaf]] || [[word:mochangafkaf|mochangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mochangasha|mochangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mochangshĂ«asha|mochangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mochangroasha|mochangroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mochangmuasha|mochangmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mochangyaasha|mochangyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomochangnkshĂ«asha|gomochangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomochangnkroasha|gomochangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomochangnkmuasha|gomochangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomochangnkyaasha|gomochangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mochachangasha|mochachangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mochachangshĂ«asha|mochachangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mochachangroasha|mochachangroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mochachangmuasha|mochachangmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mochachangyaasha|mochachangyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomochachangnkshĂ«asha|gomochachangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomochachangnkroasha|gomochachangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomochachangnkmuasha|gomochachangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomochachangnkyaasha|gomochachangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mechĂŠngasha|mechĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mechĂŠngshĂ«asha|mechĂŠngshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mechĂŠngroasha|mechĂŠngroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mechĂŠngmuasha|mechĂŠngmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mechĂŠngyaasha|mechĂŠngyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomechĂŠngnkshĂ«asha|gomechĂŠngnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomechĂŠngnkroasha|gomechĂŠngnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomechĂŠngnkmuasha|gomechĂŠngnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomechĂŠngnkyaasha|gomechĂŠngnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mochfangasha|mochfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mochfangshĂ«asha|mochfangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mochfangroasha|mochfangroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mochfangmuasha|mochfangmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mochfangyaasha|mochfangyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomochfangnkshĂ«asha|gomochfangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomochfangnkroasha|gomochfangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomochfangnkmuasha|gomochfangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomochfangnkyaasha|gomochfangnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
